text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A concert to celebrate the achievements of
Umamusume in the world of racing is coming up
soon. I'm heading to the student council office to
drop off a copy of a new song that's set to debut,
when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What are we going to sing? Oh golly, I'm so
excited!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: We're supposed to get the song today... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
In your hand... Is that the demo for "Never
Looking Back"?!
choice_data_list:
Yeah, I'm supposed to deliver it to the student
council president.

Yeah, I'm supposed to deliver it to the student
council president.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez is out, but I know all the details. I'll take that
off your hands!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The three of us are going to do the vocals on the new track! Actually, we were just having a meeting about it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we get to sing! Isn't this great,
Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... sure...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Uh, it's just... Am I really a good choice for a
vocalist?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There are tons of better singers out there who'd
love to do the concert...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so that's why you've been looking kinda
down.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But, come on, there's more to being a vocalist
than just singing nicely.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
There's the style of the song to think about, plus
teamwork with the other vocalists... I think there's
a good reason the three of us got picked.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She's right! I'm pretty nervous too, but I know I've
just gotta go for it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I get to do it with you two, the first friends I
made after coming to Tracen. That makes me so
happy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, you don't have to make your mind up right
now. Either way, we're gonna practice for the
concert.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, okay.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's kick this thing off! It's our first-ever
event as an official trio!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it! So I was thinking, we should have a
little party together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I kinda wanna get some exercise though.
How about you, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I... really don't know. Um, which do you think is
good?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A get-together it is! We can munch on some
snacks while we chat!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Chatting and snacking? I have a very bad feeling
about this...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I brought cake, pudding, parfaits, meat
buns, and hamburgers... What a feast! You two
dig in, you hear? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is all the stuff on that one plate supposed to be for me? That's enough food for a whole day! My stomach's gonna explode if I eat it all!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta try these hamburgers! They're so
juicy and yummy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. They do look quite good. You can have
mine too if you like.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Don't mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So that's Suzuka's strategy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... So much eating, so much chatting! I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Me too. It's surprising how much we didn't know
about each other even though we're roommates.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, for sure. And you really saved me from a
food coma, Suzuka. When I'm with you two,
anything seems possible!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The more we learn about each other, the better
our concert performance will be!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Will getting to know one another better
help us synchronize our voices?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! I just know we can find a unique
harmony that's all our own!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
A unique harmony... A song for the three of us... Is
that why I was chosen?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see how our song turns out!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, me neither.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Our version of "Never Looking Back"... I really
can't wait to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget, we'll be singing other songs too!
Better get to rehearsing while we can!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's do some light practice focusing on the offbeat today. You know rhythm's vital for both singing and dancing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so the main beat is BA ba, BA ba and the
offbeat is ba BAP, ba BAP... Like that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You got it. Let's keep it simple and just jump in
time with the offbeat! Aaand... go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Am I doing it right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Perfect! Just like that, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Uh, umm... BA bap, BA bap...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Suzuka, you switched to the main beat. If you
get confused, just count "one and two and three
and four," and jump on every "and"!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hop on the "and" part... Okay, got it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
One! Hop! Two! Hop! Three! Hop! Four! Hop!
...Like that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah. You're doing... perfect.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Suzuka, the way you say hop like you're a
li'l bunny is so gosh-darn cute!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. Did I say that out loud?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You didn't notice? You were counting
"One! Hop! Two! Hop!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry! It wasn't weird or anything! I
think that's a great way to count!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's teach everyone to do it like that
during the full rehearsal!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really? Well... I'm glad I could help.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I suppose even when I fumble, I can still help
everyone with the routine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I've always been a natural at this, so I'm
not exactly sure how to teach people who are
struggling.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So there are some things you don't know. I
wonder... Maybe that's why they put me on vocals
too.
